options.name: -layers
options.description: Specify one or multiple layers to add dummy wires.

options.name: -masks
options.description: Specify one or multiple mask number which short dummy boundary wires snap to. The number of specified mask values should match the number of specified layers in option layers.

options.name: -shape
options.description: Specify shape of dummy wires, default=None.

options.name: -shortWires
options.description: Specify one or multiple set of length of short dummy boundary wires and space between them. The number of specfied shortWires values should be twice of the number of specified layers in option layers.

options.name: -space
options.description: Specify one or multiple space values to design boundary, default=0. The number of specified space values should match the number of specified layers in option layers.
